raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint against XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX, and American Express. 

On XX/XX/year> in XXXX, XXXX, I was subjected to a high-pressure timeshare sales presentation lasting over XXXX hours. I was told I had to apply for a XXXX American Express credit card to complete the purchase. 

The true cost and financial impact were not disclosed. We paid over XXXX for a product we were unable to use. The debt was later sent to collections. 

I want to dispute this debt, I am requesting investigation, reversal of related charges and interest, and resolution of this matter.
